C00.summary: Actual Claude CLI review confirmed Matter-first trace rules. No P0/P1 findings; three P3 notes.

findings.title: Matter-first trace rules are contract metadata only; runtime enforcement is deferred
findings.details: Trace rules lock tenant scope, triggers, trace fields, entity policies, and failure modes at the contract layer; runtime enforcement remains for later RPs.
findings.recommendation: Carry these rules into executable Core/Matter/DMS/Billing/Portal/AI validators before workflows touch scoped data.

findings.title: C00 review result was pre-staged ahead of independent review
findings.details: The prior artifact asserted C00 PASS_WITH_FINDINGS before the real independent review ran and shared the same timestamp as command evidence.
findings.recommendation: Regenerate claude-review-result.json from the actual C00 run with distinct review_execution metadata.

findings.title: matter_id.required_when wording is narrower than the canonical trigger list
findings.details: Field-level wording summarizes client/document/finance/external-share/portal/AI-output but omits explicit matter and document-version triggers that are present in default_scope.
findings.recommendation: Align wording with the full default_scope trigger list or note that default_scope is canonical.

parsed_review.review_notes: Actual claude-opus-4-8 max read-only CLI review completed. No P0/P1 findings; P2 findings, if any, are absent; P3 notes are recorded in adjudication and do not block this subphase.

review_execution.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --tools Read,Grep,Glob --permission-mode dontAsk --output-format json
